resources.string: All the stories at the heart of the game.
Already have an account? Log in
You\'re no longer following this author
The lineup for this team hasn\'t been announced quite yet.
Looks like there haven’t been any key moments during this half.
There has been a problem saving your progress. Try again in a minute.
You have successfully opted out on this device.
Something went wrong. Please try again later.
You have successfully opted out on this account.
Something went wrong. Please try again later.
This comment is abusive or harmful
This comment is trolling or baiting
Are you sure you want to lock this user?

All Code of Conduct violations are taken seriously and can result in a loss of commenting or subscription privileges. To help maintain a safe place for all subscribers, we ask you to flag any violations in our community sections for moderator review. Have additional questions? You can

Great content. Great conversation. The Athletic publishes the very best storytelling in sports and our community sections give readers the chance to connect with each other and our writers via lively discussion and debate in a respectful and safe forum. Please help foster this community by abiding by the Code of Conduct.
Abuse, harassment, bullying and personal attacks are unacceptable.
Racism, discrimination and hate speech are not permitted.
No trolling, flaming or baiting comments allowed.
Don’t post spam, advertising, vulgarities, or irrelevant, illegal, inappropriate material.
Something went wrong. Comment could not be deleted!
Be the first to comment on this story
This comment is abusive or harmful
This comment is trolling or baiting
Comments are suspended for this article.
Something went wrong. Comment could not be saved!
Your account has been temporarily locked for violating The Athletic’s Code of Conduct. Please try again in %1$s.
Your account has been temporarily locked for violating The Athletic’s Code of Conduct.
Your comment will show you follow:
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Access The Athletic on the web
Participate in writer Q&As and subscriber forums
Your account will allow you to:
To participate, please create an account
Feature Switches\nGrey = local w. undefined value
Please visit your account settings on nytimes.com/account to change or update your email address.
Please visit %1$s in a browser to manage your subscription.

We have updated our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to reflect the regulations in your country of residence. By clicking the button below, you acknowledge and consent to our updated policies. For more details and to see the full policies, click here.

We have updated our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to reflect the regulations in your country of residence. By clicking the button below, you acknowledge and consent to our updated policies. For more details and to see the full policies, click here.

We have made some changes to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. By clicking the button below, you acknowledge and consent to our updated policies. For more details and to see the full policies, click here.

We have made some changes to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. By clicking the button below, you acknowledge and consent to our updated policies. For more details and to see the full policies, click here.
There was an issue getting more details about this ad
Device is offline. Please check your internet connection and try again.
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Your subscription to The Athletic has been activated.
Be the first to know when the biggest moments across all sports happen with Top Sports News alerts.
Get informed as important sports news breaks
Marking content as outdated will move it down all user\'s home feeds significantly and not impact the league, team, or logged out feeds.
This piece has been marked as outdated
Couldn\'t update your subscription. Please try again.
You\'ve reached the end of the list.
New app version installed.\nReload for best experience.
Search for teams, leagues, or authors
We will send your purchase confirmation and gift PDF to the Email address connected to your The Athletic account, unless otherwise noted.
Thank you for giving the gift of The Athletic!
In-app billing service is unavailable. Please check that you have Android Market/Play installed in version 11.3.02 or newer.
Error making purchase. Internal billing problem.
You cannot flag the same comment more than once.
We\'re having trouble contacting you. Please update your email address.
Something went wrong. Please try again later.
No or weak internet connection.\nCheck your connection and try again.
You are not following any team or league.\nChoose at least one thing you love!
Payment Failed: Please update your payment details to avoid losing access to The Athletic.
Dev Prev Data w/ Prod Schema
Stg Prev Data w/ Prod Schema
Get more coverage on the teams you love
You are now following this league
Sorry, we don’t have standings for this league right now
You are no longer following this league
Limit the Use of My Sensitive Information
Press play to start live preview.
It\'s time to update your login info.
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Field must be at least %1$d characters long
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
From breaking news to score updates, never miss a moment.
Get alerts for the teams and leagues you follow.
No ET2 Events yet. Waiting on ET2 Events.
In order to fully experience The Athletic, you\'ll need to turn on notifications.
You\'ll need to turn on Push
Go to device settings on your device to allow notifications from The Athletic.
Allow app to send you notifications?
Thanks for your interest.\nWe will share more once you\'re back online.
You are back online! Let\'s pick up where we left off
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
We\'ll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site.
Open ad when you\'re back online.
Continue setting up your account by selecting preferences to customize your experience.
Get notifications about the %1$s and your other leagues.
Get notifications about the %1$s and your other teams.
Get notifications about the %1$s and your other teams and leagues.
Search team, league, school or city
Billed as %1$s/year after 7-day free trial ends. Cancel anytime during trial.
The stories you care about on your favorite teams.
Subscribe to get the full story.
Show your friends your Picks of the day.
Track your Pick\'em stats throughout the World Cup, and see how your predictions rank against our TA Soccer experts.
No games today, come back on game day to make your picks.
Settled games will appear here. Make a pick today to see your results tomorrow.
No picks yet. Lock in your predictions for today\'s games.
We\'re just having a moment, please try again later.
We\'re just having a moment, please try again later.
Your picks are saved. We\'re just having a moment, please try again later.
Your games are still here. We\'re just having a moment, please try again later.
Something went wrong while updating your pick, please try again later.
Want to get better at predictions?
It looks like you are missing Google Services. In order to use The Athletic, you need Google Services installed on your device.
To ensure uninterrupted podcast download, please turn off the battery saver mode.
Something went wrong during the file deletion.
You haven’t saved any podcasts yet
Use the Discover tab to access our extensive library of insider podcasts and follow shows for your favorite teams and leagues.
Follow a podcast to set notifications
You are not following any podcasts yet
Video will begin after the ad
This preference may be forgotten if you delete and reinstall the app.
Play videos automatically across app and web.
The biggest sports moments, beyond followed teams and leagues
Failed to enable Top Sports News notifications. View
You will now receive Top Sports News notifications. View

By opting out here, we will not “share” or “sell” your information and you will be opted out of “targeted advertising” as defined under certain privacy laws. Please note that you won’t be able to change this preference. Your choice here is unrelated to the mechanisms by which you can opt out of emails from us, which are described in our Privacy Policy.
Each daily puzzle is available 12 a.m. local time.
Changes to your Facebook profile will appear here.
Switch the toggle to opt out.

You have the right to opt-out of “sale,” “sharing,” and “targeting advertising” as defined under certain privacy laws. You can make your choices by making the appropriate selection below.

If you are a California resident, you also have the ability to limit the use of your sensitive information in particular circumstances. Click here to learn more about this right and initiate your request.

To find out more about our privacy practices, please review our Privacy Policy.
We have received your request. Check back later to confirm your choice.
Device is offline. Please check your internet connection and try again.
This affects suggested sports and teams based on the selected region. Your followed teams, leagues, and authors will not be affected.
This live audio room is at max capacity. Please try again later.
Push Notification has been sent to users.

Our chat sections give users the chance to connect with each other and our writers in a respectful and troll-free setting. Here are some ground rules:

Treat others with respect.
No abuse or hateful conduct.
No trolling or baiting.
No spam or self-promotion.

All Code of Conduct violations are taken seriously and can result in a loss of commenting or subscription privileges. Please flag any violations for moderator review. For more info, visit our Code of Conduct page.
The fans want to hear from you
It looks like the host just ended this live audio room. Thank you for tuning in.
Leaving the room will end the room. Are you sure you want to leave?
This indicator means the host has chosen to record this room for future use. They will be provided a copy of the audio when the room is closed.
Request Granted. You are now on stage
Your request is pending host approval
The host has removed you from the stage
You’ve been locked from speaking or commenting for violating The Athletic’s Code of Conduct
%1$s is not following anyone right now.
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Do you really want to remove all saved stories?
No game information at the moment
Search for an author and your results will appear here
Search for a league and your results will appear here
Search for a team and your results will appear here
Unable to gift article. An error occurred, please try again later.
Explore this gift article from The Athletic. You can read it for free without a subscription.\n\n%s
Explore this gift article from The Athletic. You can read it for free without a subscription. %s
Enable gift link so anyone can read for free.
Share this article with anyone to read for free.
Athletic subscribers can gift this article to anyone to read for free- even nonsubscribers.
Unable to gift article. You\'ve used all of your gift articles this month.
Something has gone wrong.\nPlease try again later.
In order to view this takeaway\nyou need to update your app.
The story failed to load.\nPlease try again.
You will permanently lose access to all history associated with this account. You will no longer be able to use features that require a New York Times account.\n\nThis cannot be undone.
Delete the New York Times account for

If this account has purchased a subscription from the New York Times, you’ll need to cancel it and have your benefits end to proceed.\n\nAfter your account has been deleted, you will no longer be able to log in to New York Times products using this account, including News, Cooking, Crossword, Wirecutter, and others. You will also stop receiving marketing emails and newsletters to this account’s email address.
The password must be least 6 characters long.
The verification code has been sent to your email. This may take one to two minutes to show up in your inbox.
An error occurred during login. Try logging in again.
Your account was successfully created, but an error occurred during login. Try logging in again.
You will permanently lose access to all history associated with this account.
Are you sure you want to delete your account?
We’re sorry. We’re having a technical issue right now. Please try again later.
There is an active subscription associated with this email address. Please cancel the subscription or wait for your benefits to end.
Your New York Times account has been successfully deleted and you will be logged out.
Didn’t receive a code? Check your spam folder or request a new one.
Regi-Lite Bad TA Token, Good NYT User
Regi-Lite Bad TA Token, No NYT User
Regi-Lite Good TA Token, Good NYT User
Regi-Lite Good TA Token, No NYT User
By continuing, you agree to the Terms of Sale, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy. Link.
By continuing, you agree to the new Terms of Sale, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy.
Log in or create an account
Log in or create an account
Enter the code we sent to
We’re sorry, but an error has occurred. If you continue to see this message, please email us.
Device is offline. Please check your internet connection and try again.
Please enter a valid email address
This email is associated with a Google or Facebook account. Please try another login method.
Wrong password. Try again or log in with a one-time code.
Mail provided is invalid, please provide valid working mail and try again.
PLease provide an e-mail address that is between 5 and 254 characters in length.
This code has expired. Please request a new one to continue.
The token provided has already been redeemed
There was a problem connecting to your Facebook account at this time. Please try again.
There was a problem connecting to your Google account at this time. Please try again.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Use your NYT login to access The Athletic.\nIf you have an Athletic account, it will be automatically linked.
Log in with The New York Times
The code you entered is incomplete. Please check your email and try again.
Request a new one in %1$d seconds.
Didn\'t receive a code? Check your spam folder or
We\'ve sent a login code to
This code will stay valid for 10 minutes.
I would like to receive offers and updates from The Athletic and The Times. I understand I may opt out at any time.
You agree to receive updates and offers from The Times. You may opt out or contact us anytime.
Please create a new ppassword to use with your New York Times account.
Please set a password to update your login.
You\'ll now be able to use your account for The Athletic and all of The New York Times.
By creating an account, you agree to the Terms of Sale, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy.
By creating an account, you agree to the Terms of Sale, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy. Link.
to update your login. This code expires in 10 minutes.
Uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and standard symbols only
Newly registered User (Works on LIRE Staging Env ONLY)
The verification code sent to your email failed to send. Please try again.
Sorry, this code has expired. Please request a new code below.
The code you entered is incomplete. Please check your email and try again.
The code you entered is incorrect. Please check your email and try again.
We’re sorry, but an error has occurred. If you continue to see this message, please email us.
You’ll now be able to use your account for all of The New York Times including News, Games, Cooking, and The Athletic.
Get exclusive team coverage. %1$s %2$s for your first year.
Get exclusive team coverage. One week free and then just %1$s.
There was an error getting subscriptions. Please try again later.
Billed as %1$s for your first year, %2$s thereafter. Cancel anytime.
%1$s billed monthly after 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime.
The New York Times Privacy Policy
The New York Times Terms of Service

We and our %1$s use cookies and similar methods to store and/or access information on a device and process your personal data (such as unique identifiers and browsing data) for personalised advertising, advertising measurement, audience research and services development, including by using precise geolocation data, and identification through device scanning. To learn more, view our Cookie Policy and Privacy Policy. By clicking ‘Accept all,’ you consent to the processing of your data by us and our vendors on nytimes.com and our News, Cooking, Games, and Audio apps using the above methods. You can always withdraw your consent by clicking on Manage Privacy Preferences in our website footer or in your app Privacy Settings. Your preferences here are unrelated to Apple’s App Tracking Transparency Framework.
Your preference could not be saved, please try again later
You are now following this team
Sorry, we don’t a roster for this team right now
Sorry, we don’t have standings for this team right now
Sorry, we don’t have stats for this team right now
You are no longer following this team
We encourage you to review our updated Terms of Sale, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy. By continuing, you agree to the updated Terms listed here.

(function() { var pageViewId = \'%1$s\'; window.googletag = window.googletag || {}; window.googletag.cmd = window.googletag.cmd || []; window.googletag.cmd.push(function() { window.googletag.pubads().setTargeting(\'page_view_id\', pageViewId); }); })();
Field must be exactly %d characters long
Fullname must have at least %d characters
Field must be at most %d characters long
Field must be at least %d characters long
Must be at least %d years long
Password must be at least 8 characters long
Field must be between %1$d and %2$d characters long
Username must be at least 4 characters long
Swipe up to see more videos
Check out top highlights, expert analysis, and can’t-miss moments — personalized just for you.\nNow available in the My Feed tab.
The player is having trouble. We\'ll have it up and running in no time.
The internet connection appears to be offline
The Athletic uses a rendering engine provided by ‘%1$s’ to display article text and the version on this device is outdated. Please update %1$s for the best possible viewing experience.
